body:
plague-memoria:

i love attention from the people i talk to, send me 10 messages in a row, tell me about your day in full detail, send me selfies and pics of your food, tell me about what you’re doing tomorrow, gush about that show your watching, just talk to me and dont stop

trail.content_raw: i love attention from the people i talk to, send me 10 messages in a row, tell me about your day in full detail, send me selfies and pics of your food, tell me about what you’re doing tomorrow, gush about that show your watching, just talk to me and dont stop
